title: Body Armour Craft (Slipstrike / Falconer’s — T1 Evasion + Deflection + Resists)
goal: Slipstrike Vest (pure evasion) or Falconer's Jacket (evasion/es) endgame body armour with T1 %evasion or T1 max evasion prefix, deflection-rating suffix, and clean resistance + unveiled tail.

baseRequirements.base: Slipstrike Vest (pure evasion, ilvl 79) OR Falconer's Jacket (evasion/es, ilvl 78)
baseRequirements.hint: Body armours roll a large mod pool — perfect exalt is wasted here. Use Greater Exalted Orb instead.

steps.title: Perfect Transmute + Aug → magic with T1 %evasion or T1 Max Evasion + good suffix
steps.description:
Bring multiple bases. Apply Perfect Transmute + Perfect Aug. You want:

• Prefix: T1 %evasion OR T1 Maximum Evasion (NOT hybrid — hybrid kills the craft).
• Suffix: any resistance OR deflection rating.

If prefix is hybrid → discard, try next base.
steps.stopLoss: Hybrid prefix is a brick. Move to next base, don't try to recover.

steps.title: Greater Resistance Essence → upgrade to 3-mod rare
steps.description: Apply any Greater Resistance essence — adds the third mod. End state: 1 prefix + 2 suffix.

steps.title: Dextral Necromancy + Preserved Rib → fill suffix slot
steps.description: Use Omen of Dextral Necromancy with Preserved Rib to fill the remaining suffix slot. Don't unveil yet.

steps.title: Homogenising + Greater Exalt → prefixes (use GREATER, not Perfect)
steps.description:
Use Omen of Homogenising Exaltation + Omen of Greater Exaltation + Greater Exalted Orb.

DO NOT use Perfect Exalt on body armours — the mod pool is too large for the perfect roll odds to pay off. Greater Exalt gives you something halfway decent on average.

Risk: double hybrid roll is a brick. Recover with Chaos Orb / Annulment Orb if it bricks.
steps.stopLoss: Double hybrid roll bricks the craft. Set max-spend budget before slamming.

steps.title: Unveil suffix with Abyssal Echoes
steps.description: Prefixes done — now unveil the final suffix using Abyssal Echoes. Targets: deflection rating, then any resistance.

pricingTips: Slipstrike pure evasion sells fastest. Lead with %evasion + deflection in your description.
Falconer's hybrid sells slower but commands a premium with good rolls — patience pays.
notes: Body armour mod pool is huge — accept that you'll get something 'mostly good' rather than perfect.
Greater Exalt > Perfect Exalt here. Don't waste the perfect.
